title: brassica oleracea convar. costata
intro: Brassica oleracea convar. costata, also known as kale or borecole, is a cultivar of the Brassica oleracea plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The health benefits of kale include its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its richness in fiber and minerals, making it a nutritious addition to a healthy diet. Herbal preparations of kale can be used in teas, capsules, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
